# Predictive checks and fit {#sec-ppc}

::: {.callout-note}
Drafted by a LLM-based AI tool (Claude Code/Opus 4.8). Scaffold — an outline of intended content and its source artifacts, not finished prose.
:::

*[Scaffold]* Whether the model can generate data like the data — before and after seeing it.

## Prior-predictive checks {#sec-ppc-prior}

*[Scaffold]* Priors cover the observed outcome range without concentrating implausibly. *Source:* `prior_predictive_check.png`.

## Posterior-predictive checks {#sec-ppc-posterior}

*[Scaffold]* Replicated data overlaid on observed; systematic misfit flagged. The Beta-Binomial respects the count bounds. *Source:* `posterior_predictive_check.png`.

## The floor diagnostic {#sec-ppc-floor}

*[Scaffold]* The proportion-at-zero check — the graded model does **not** reproduce the floor for phonetic spelling / nonword reading, which is what motivates the binary off-floor estimand (@sec-methods-floor). *Source:* `proportion_at_zero_ppc`, the floored-outcome models.
